title: Our Certifications | Purbachal Apparel Limited
meta_desc: Purbachal Apparel Limited holds 12 international certifications including OEKO-TEX, GOTS, SEDEX, WRAP, ISO 14001, EcoVadis and more.
hero_desc: Purbachal Apparel Limited holds 12 internationally recognized certifications that validate our commitment to quality, ethics, environmental responsibility, and worker welfare.
certs_desc: Our comprehensive portfolio of certifications reflects our rigorous adherence to global standards in production, labour practices, and environmental management.
pillars_desc: Our certifications span three critical dimensions that define responsible and sustainable garment manufacturing.

pillar_items.title: Production Excellence
pillar_items.text: ISO 14001, Higg Index, GOTS, OCS, and RCS certifications verify that our production processes meet stringent environmental and quality management standards throughout the entire supply chain.

pillar_items.title: Ethical Compliance
pillar_items.text: Certifications from RSC, Amfori/BSCI, SEDEX, WRAP, and EcoVadis confirm that our factory meets international standards for labour rights, health and safety, and responsible business conduct.

pillar_items.title: Worker Welfare
pillar_items.text: OEKO-TEX Standard 100, Cotton Made in Africa, and our social compliance audits demonstrate our unwavering commitment to the health, safety, and dignity of every worker in our facility.

csr_body: Our certifications are backed by genuine on-the-ground action. From healthcare programmes to environmental initiatives, we embed responsibility into every aspect of our operations.

csr_items.title: Environmental Management
csr_items.text: Tree plantation drives, rainwater harvesting, and a 300 KW solar energy target demonstrate our proactive approach to environmental stewardship.

csr_items.title: Employee Welfare
csr_items.text: Free healthcare services, fire safety training, anti-harassment policies, and skills development programmes are integral to our workforce strategy.

csr_items.title: Community Engagement
csr_items.text: We actively participate in community development programmes, supporting education, health awareness, and emergency relief in and around Gazipur.

cta_desc: Source with confidence from a manufacturer that holds 12 international certifications and audits its practices continuously.
